name: NextSource Materials Inc.
description: NextSource Materials Inc. is a strategic materials development company based in Toronto, Canada, focused on becoming an integrated, global supplier of critical battery and technology materials. The company is currently ramping up production at its Molo Mine in Madagascar, which hosts one of the largest and highest-quality graphite deposits globally. By leveraging its proprietary SuperFlake® graphite, NextSource aims to support the sustainable energy revolution through strategic partnerships and the development of battery anode facilities, providing essential materials for the electric vehicle and technology industries.
